regulatory_events.title: AI Act Amendments
regulatory_events.summary: MEPs reach preliminary agreement on AI Act amendments including extended deadlines for high-risk requirements, sensitive data processing provisions, and ban on nonconsensual explicit deepfakes.

regulatory_events.title: PIPA Amendment
regulatory_events.summary: South Korea amended Personal Information Protection Act with penalty ceiling of 10% of total turnover and places personal supervisory liability on CEOs, effective September 11.

regulatory_events.title: Age Assurance Compliance
regulatory_events.summary: ICO published letter to social media and video-sharing platforms calling for increased age verification measures to protect children online.

regulatory_events.title: KIDS Act
regulatory_events.summary: US House Committee on Energy and Commerce approved KIDS Act, containing Kids Online Safety Act and other children's digital safety legislation.

regulatory_events.title: Surveillance Pricing Investigation
regulatory_events.summary: US House Committee on Oversight probes booking apps on surveillance pricing schemes using harvested personal data for individualized pricing.

legal_tech_signals.description: AI legal research startup launches 'Legal Reasoning' tool that outperforms ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini on bar exam benchmark, answering all 200 questions correctly
Goldman Sachs hiring Legal, Artificial Intelligence Attorney at Vice President level for New York/Dallas offices
Clio launched Clio Capital, financing program for law firms using their practice management platform
Australian legal tech startup raises A$7M to bring 'fact management' platform to U.S. market, opening San Francisco office

top_stories.headline: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Inks Massive NVIDIA Compute Deal
top_stories.why_it_matters: This $2B partnership with one-gigawatt compute allocation signals massive infrastructure investment in AI development and represents a significant shift in how AI startups are scaling their operations.

top_stories.headline: MEPs reach preliminary political agreement on AI omnibus
top_stories.why_it_matters: The EU continues to lead global AI regulation with amendments extending deadlines and banning nonconsensual deepfakes, setting precedent for other jurisdictions considering AI governance.

top_stories.headline: The Shape of the Thing: AI Agents Move From Co-Intelligence to Management
top_stories.why_it_matters: We're entering a new phase where humans manage AI agents rather than collaborate with them, with exponential capability improvements enabling radical changes to how work gets done.

one_to_watch.headline: South Korea overhauls PIPA with 10% revenue penalties and CEO liability
one_to_watch.why_it_matters: This represents one of the most significant privacy law updates globally, with personal CEO liability setting a new standard that could influence privacy regulation worldwide.
